Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class Network

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Network
public class Network extends Metadata

Java class for Network complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Network">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="allowInternalUserLogin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="allowMembersToFlag" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="allowedExtensions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="caseCommentEmailTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="changePasswordTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="chgEmailVerNewTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="chgEmailVerOldTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="communityRoles" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CommunityRoles" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="deviceActEmailTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="disableReputationRecordConversations" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="emailFooterLogo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="emailFooterText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="emailSenderAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="emailSenderName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="enableApexCDNCaching" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCustomVFErrorPageOverrides" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDirectMessages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableExperienceBundleBasedSnaOverrideEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableGuestChatter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableGuestFileAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableGuestMemberVisibility" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableImageOptimizationCDN" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInvitation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableKnowledgeable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableMemberVisibility" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNicknameDisplay" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePrivateMessages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableReputation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableShowAllNetworkSettings" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSiteAsContainer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableTalkingAboutStats" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableTopicAssignmentRules" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableTopicSuggestions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUpDownVote" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="feedChannel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="forgotPasswordTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="gatherCustomerSentimentData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="headlessForgotPasswordTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lockoutTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="logoutUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="maxFileSizeKb" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="navigationLinkSet" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NavigationLinkSet" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="networkMemberGroups" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NetworkMemberGroup" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="networkPageOverrides" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NetworkPageOverride" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="newSenderAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="picassoSite" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recommendationAudience" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RecommendationAudience" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recommendationDefinition" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RecommendationDefinition" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="reputationLevels" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ReputationLevelDefinitions" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="reputationPointsRules" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ReputationPointsRules" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="selfRegMicroBatchSubErrorEmailTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="selfRegProfile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="selfRegistration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sendWelcomeEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="site" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="siteArchiveStatus" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SitesArchiveStatus" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="status" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NetworkStatus"/>
         <element name="tabs" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NetworkTabSet"/>
         <element name="urlPathPrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="verificationTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="welcomeTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
